summary:
SPIRITUAL WARFARE AND COMMUNION: Brandon emphasizes the importance of taking communion to enter boldly into the throne room, noting that the blood of Jesus provides power, authority, and the ability to see holy things and future events without being snared by demonic forces. Brandon recalls a conversation with Diana about the Old Covenant sacrifices compared to the ultimate sacrifice of Jesus, which removed the need for daily animal sacrifices and allows believers to walk in victory. Brandon states that believers have a blood covenant, authority over principalities, and should claim prosperity in their health, bank accounts, marriages, and jobs.

UNITED STATES POLITICS AND JUDICIAL SYSTEM: Brandon prays specifically for Supreme Court Justices Amy Coney Barrett and John Roberts, asking that they remain uninfluenced by satanic forces and make godly decisions rather than acting on political bias. Brandon notes that there are three other judges who will try to cause great confusion in the days ahead, praying that their demonic blinders be removed or that they be replaced. Brandon also prays for Donald Trump, asking for supernatural protection over his mind, decisions, and family against assassination attempts and bad influencers, while extending similar prayers for Vance and his family to facilitate a massive financial wealth transfer for the righteous.

INTERNATIONAL CONFLICTS AND MILITARY PROTECTION: Brandon intercedes for military personnel deployed in Iraq, declaring angelic protection against secret drone attacks and missiles across the Navy, Air Force, Marines, and Space Force. Brandon recounts visions and insights concerning global leaders and regions, specifically mentioning Zelensky, Macron, and false flag events intended to escalate war involving Ukraine, Russia, and Poland, particularly Warsaw. Brandon also describes a covert operation regarding a nuclear Iran, stating that secret intelligence forces will bypass defensive mountain systems to annihilate weapons of mass destruction.

PROPHETIC TIMELINES AND GLOBAL ECONOMICS: Brandon describes shifting visions between the months of July and April, referencing Easter Sunday and locations like Australia and Iraq. Brandon then details a vision of South Korea and Japan involving illuminated buildings and the release of new financial laws, highlighting the word Sooners in relation to people waiting for a sudden influx of wealth. Brandon mentions Canada and a specific city on the Pacific where leadership intends to adopt a new banking system, noting that this financial shift is tied to the year 2025.

ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE AND DEMONIC FOUNDATIONS: Brandon recounts a vision of Artificial Intelligence appearing like a metallic, half-skeleton face resembling a Terminator, with a split, two-faced design featuring red, demonic eyes. Brandon explicitly states that the foundation of this dark AI and computer tech system is rooted in demonic spirits, Nephilim, and fallen entities, warning of the underlying dark intentions of the men and forces behind its creation.

SPIRITUAL HARVEST AND REVIVAL: Brandon describes a vision of a vast sea of humanity facing the Great White Throne of Judgment, noting that Jesus is delaying His return to prevent mass damnation and is instead longing for a final harvest of souls. Brandon sees a flow of anointing reminiscent of Kathryn Kuhlman, bringing healings and deliverances, and mentions a storm in the East accompanied by light and doves. Brandon emphasizes that God is calling upon everyone, from the youth to the elderly, to participate in bringing in this harvest of wayward souls, referencing Kenneth E. Hagin's teachings on speaking in tongues and quoting Romans 8:26 to highlight the Holy Spirit's role in guiding intercessory prayer.
rawData: [March 25, 2025]-[Come pray with us – man - the presence of the Lord was strong]-[https://youtu.be/GvCEdjOOuxU]-[Hey, good morning family. How are y'all doing today? Well, thank you for joining us. So let's take communion together today. All right, let's take communion. Let's enter into that throne. I'll pray real quick. I'll pray as long as I feel that stirring. Let's see if we see anything new. If I see anything new, I'll let you know when I pray over my eyes that I am not snared by any satanic or demonic force, that I hear only and see only what the Lord is wanting me to see, that there's no familiar spirits that are able to come in and wreak havoc on anything. So we come before Him boldly into His throne by taking communion first. That's what I do this for. People go, 'Why? Why do you?' because this is the meal that heals. This is the blood and the body, and this is what makes us whole. This is what makes us righteous. This is what makes us all that we are. Diana was telling me last night, she said, 'Brandon, do you realize how many animals they sacrificed for sin because they always had a guilty conscience?' Yeah, on the Old Covenant. She said they had no choice, or that guilt never went away, and it was only washed away by the blood of an animal. But then Jesus—and that's what this is—this represents Him. This represents what He did. We take this in like that sacrifice of what they did to wash their sins away for their day, or however often they did it. They probably didn't kill an animal every day; that would get expensive. But I don't know how they did it. I mean, seriously, how often did they do it? Once a week? But we can come to Him every day. Never take it for granted. Never take it for granted how we are able to take this communion and come before Him boldly into His throne because back then, for sin, God wiped everybody out and killed them all. It was bad. You weren't even able to go into the holy of holies without a rope tied to your ankle. Because if you walked into the holy of holies and you had sin in you and you were messed up, the priest would fall over dead right there and they'd have to dragged them out. If the bell stopped ringing—because they had a bell on their garment and if the bell wasn't ringing, they realized that person was dead—so they dragged him out with a rope because they couldn't enter into the holy of holies to come and get him because He's so holy. Yeah, because God is a holy God. But the only way we're able to do it now is by the blood and by the body and what He did for us. Jesus paid the price for you to walk in victory—the ultimate price. He was without sin. He knew no sin, but He died for you and I and took our sin. Thank you, Father, for doing that for us. That's why we make much of the blood of Jesus, because it's the blood that gives us power. It's the blood that gives us authority. It's the blood that seats us at the throne room, and we're able to do what we're doing right now and be able to see holy things, to be able to see that which is to come. It doesn't come by any other means; it comes by what He did on that cross and how He rose again on the third day. That's what makes us whole. What can wash away my sins? Nothing but the blood of Jesus. What can make me whole again? Nothing but the blood of Jesus. Do you understand? It's all by His body. It was all about the blood, and it's so important. He said, 'Take this often in remembrance of Me.' Take this. Why? Because He's wanting you to understand you no longer have to kill a goat, you no longer have to kill a cow, you don't have to do any of those things—a sheep or whatever. You just can come boldly into My throne because of what I did for you on that cross. And all I did for you, when I said, 'It is finished,' it's finished. And He was without any sin, and all of it went on Him. The sins of the world went on Him. And within just a moment, that curtain was ripped—my goodness—and the glory of the Lord was able to come inside of us now. The Holy Spirit—He left us a Comforter in Acts chapter 2. There came a sound of a mighty rushing wind, and they spoke with tongues of fire. Think about it. All that was done, Jesus did it all. And then the Holy Ghost came, and He was able to indwell every single one of us. We're no longer walking around all messed up because Jesus paid the price. And we take this communion and we're thankful. This is the sacrifice. Thank you for making that ultimate sacrifice for us. We don't have to kill a goat today. We don't have to kill the fatted calf today. Because some of us, you messed up bad today on the way home from work or whatever. You can't go before a holy God with sin. The priest couldn't, but we're able to now. Why? Because Jesus did it all. So that's what we get excited about. That's why we take this, and I come before His throne, and I'm just saying thank you. Thank you for what You did for me. Thank you for what You did for us. Oh my goodness, Lord, thank you for what You did for me. Don't ever take it for granted. Two thousand years ago, it was bad. Think about that. None of us were able to. So, Father, we thank You for this body. We thank You that You were wounded for our transgressions, You were bruised for our iniquities, the chastisement of our peace was upon You, and with Your stripes we are healed. And we take this body, and we thank You, Lord, that we no longer have to kill any kind of animal, that You became the Lamb. Your blood was shed for the whole world, and You took it all for the whole world. And we worship You, and we thank You, for Jesus paid the price for us to walk in victory. And we don't have to be busted and disgusted. Thank You, Father, for all that You've done. And we take this body in the name of Jesus. Thank You, Lord. Now, Lord, we take the blood, and we thank You for Your blood, for it's the blood that washes all our sins and makes us white as snow. The Bible says if we confess our sins, He is faithful and just to forgive us of our sins and cleanse us from all unrighteousness. Thank You, Father, for the blood. Thank You, Lord, that we have authority over all principalities and powers, and we're seated with You in the heavenlies, just like Ephesians tells us we are. You believe it by faith; you receive it by faith. We receive everything. I will not lack any good thing. What the Lord has provided for me, I will not lack any good thing. I receive everything the Lord told me I could have. I will have it, and I will walk in victory concerning it in every area of my life. Thank You, Father. Now, Father, we just come before Your throne boldly, and I plead the blood over my eyes. I plead the blood over my ears and over my mind and over my spiritual seeing. Father, as a watchman on the wall, as Diana's here, Father, all the ones that are represented in this broadcast right now watching us, we hold the blood of Jesus over us. We plead the blood. We apply the blood of Jesus. And Father, we make much of Your blood. And we thank You, Lord, that we will not be snared by any satanic or demonic force. We will not be snared by any kind of familiar spirits. We hear You, Father. We plead the blood over our eyes. We plead the blood. And if You want to show us anything, we seek You, Father. And we thank You, Lord, that You speak to us and You show us that which is to come. As we look out over the wall, Father, if there's anything we need to know that's coming in the future, coming in our pathway that we need to know about, Father, I thank You, Lord, that You show us that which is to come, and we can change it today. We praise You. We worship You. We come into Your throne boldly, and we sit at Your feet today. We sit at Your feet today and we make much of You, Father. And we worship You by everything we do, with prayer and petition, with thanksgiving. We make our request known unto God. We praise You. We worship You with prayer and thanksgiving. We thank You, Father, with thanksgiving. Let your request be made known unto the Lord. Now we praise You, and we take the care out of our prayer today. We worship You. Thank You, Jesus. Thank You, Father, for all that You're doing. Thank You, Lord, that You speak to us and we hear You, and a stranger's voice we will not follow. It's a covenant promise that we hear the Good Shepherd's voice. We hear the Good Shepherd's voice. We will not follow a familiar spirit. We yield our spirits over; we yield ourselves. We are a vessel—we're Your vessel. Speak through us now, Holy Spirit. When we pray in the spirit and we seek You, and we thank You, Lord, all of You and none of us. Yep, all of You and none of us. Thank You, Father. Thank You, Lord. We pray over those judges, Father. We thank You for Amy Coney Barrett and the other one. We thank You, Lord. What's his name? John Roberts. Father, I thank You, Lord, that they both are not influenced by any satanic or demonic force. We pray for our Supreme Court justices. We lift them up, Father, that their minds and their hearts are soft and pliable. And all the others, we lift every single one of them up before You. I believe there's nine of them—we lift them up before You, Father. And we thank You, Lord, that every single one of them would vote godly. But especially, You said those two were in the balance. There's nine in the Supreme Court. Okay, so Father, all nine of them, we lift them all up before You. We thank You, Lord. Out of those two, Father, You brought those two faces before me, and we lift them up before You, Father. And we take authority over any satanic or demonic influence in the name of Jesus. We say you will not vote with just a political bias or an opinion, but you'll vote godly. They'll do godly decisions. And Holy Spirit, I thank You that You would weigh on them heavily and that You would convict them of making any wrong choices for America, that America will be godly, that America will flow with the Holy Spirit and it will be a light on a hill again, that we would take our rightful place and authority and we would stand on that wall and we would tell everyone that Jesus Christ is coming, and He's coming soon. That, Father, there would be no hindrances with godly laws. And Father, I thank You, Lord, that every judge—of those other three that I saw, there's three that would try to rise up and cause great confusion in these days ahead, and we pray for the demonic blinders to be removed off of their eyes in the name of Jesus and that the righteous would rise up. And Father, I thank You, Lord, that if they don't, they'll be removed and there'll be another one replaced in their position. Father, that all hindrances, all walls of hindrances, would be removed in the name of Jesus, that there would be a great, mighty, holy flow of the glory of God in this one more time, that we would see the manifestation of the sons and the daughters one more time, and the glory of the Lord would rest on this nation and around the world. Now, Father, I thank You. I thank You, Father. I thank You, Father, for the blood. I thank You for the anointing of the Holy Ghost. I thank You, Lord, for Donald Trump and the decisions that he's making. And I pray over his mind right now in the name of Jesus, that he has the mind of Christ and there's no bad people influencing him making bad decisions. Father, that he puts up a wall, and it's a Holy Ghost wall around him, Father, with the blood of Jesus Christ, that he would hear Your voice, Father, and he would hear You and a stranger's voice he would not follow. That the blood of Jesus Christ covers him. That no calamity, no assassination attempts, nothing come nigh him, Father. He's covered from the top of his head to the soles of his feet. And that's his wife, his grandchildren, his children, his sons, his daughters; they're all covered by the blood of Jesus. We keep our eyes upon You, Lord. And as we do that, that money flows like a vessel pouring out over all the people that we can help them, Father. But Father, we don't lose track of all the things that You've given us. But Father, we keep our eyes and our face on You. Father, I thank You, Lord, that we are sold out. We are sold out to what You want us to do, that we're not distracted by any satanic or demonic force. We're not distracted by it, Father. We only have eyes on You. We keep our eyes on You today. We keep our ears toward You today. We hear You, God, and a stranger's voice we will not follow, for You are the King of kings and the Lord of lords. Thank You, Father. Thank You, Father, for the anointing. Thank You, Lord, that You break every yoke of bondage by the anointing, the anointing that sets the captives free. We have that anointing on the inside of us. The Holy Spirit dwells on the inside of us richly. By faith we believe it; I receive it. I'm wall-to-wall Holy Ghost. We only put it on You and we say, 'Jesus, You guide our lives, You direct our paths.' We hide Your word in our hearts that we might not sin against You, Lord. He says we prayed for the finances today; He said, 'I allowed you to in tongues.' Do you see? For this is the key. Bring in the harvest! Harvesters! It'll be a quick work. I see a storm in the East. And in this great storm, I still see the light and I see the doves again. Oh, and the glory. Thank You, Lord. There will be a great harvest. Some say falling away—yes—but I see the ones that I can save. You see, it's the ones that are just right on the verge of making decisions. Yeah, there's a lot of them that turn away. But during the Tribulation, they will be shaken. There's still a harvest yet to be received in the Tribulation. They will see the error in their ways. But I'm calling for the ones. He's stirring in them, calling them forth. Nothing else matters. I heard Him say, 'Nothing else matters.' Nothing else matters in one's life—either you know Me or you don't. All this other that you were concerned about—nothing else matters. For some, it's a very scary place; for some, it's a glorious place. I see the glory on the ones that know. But the ones that don't, they have sorrow. Then we say it's our job to teach them. It's our job to tell them. It's our job to warn them. We've got to warn them. For many have heard, but they are not hearing. They don't have ears to hear. They heard it, but they didn't hear it. Their ears are closed. Time to open the ears. One last call! I'm calling you in. I see Him again; He's yelling as loud as He can. Jesus, I do my best, Father. I'll give You the gifts; I'll give You the tools. Tap into Him today for the fresh fire, the fresh fruit. I'm looking for the ones that will just say yes. It's an all-hands-on-deck right now. Even to the little grandma, if you just say yes, I will use you in an extraordinary way. I'm looking for you to say yes. To the young people, there's such a great harvest in you. Satan has tried so hard to come after the youth, but I'm coming after them harder. And there will be a great harvest in the youth with signs and wonders. And then there's the elders. They're in their 80s, they're in their 90s, and they're just on death's doorstep. I'm calling them in. It will be birthed out of prayer. The importance of this channel—it will be birthed out of prayer, and there'll be many more rising up with prayer, just saying yes. Father, we say yes. Lord, we say yes. It's such a sweet presence here. The heart of the Father looking at His child that's wayward—He doesn't want one to perish but all come to repentance. He even said about the Great Falling Away that's in the Word; He's still looking at the one. He goes after the one just like His Word says; He leaves the 99 to go after the one. Even the ones that have turned their backs—the Great Falling Away—He's still looking in the backfield at the one. I could see Him longing for him right then. I could see Jesus, and He was longing for the one in the back, just looking at the one. My goodness, Diana, how much He loves us! Oh, how He loves us! He is jealous for me. Love like a hurricane—I am a tree bending beneath the weight of His glory. Oh, how He loves us! And He loves us. Oh, how He loves us! My goodness, if people truly knew it. It blessed me so today. So many people—we pray for every single one of them to love Lord, find it before it's too late. It's the way He looks at the people that are in the backfield.
